signal_sql: CASE WHEN taker_buy_volume / (volume + 1e-8) >= 0.05 AND (volume - taker_buy_volume) / (volume + 1e-8) >= 0.05 THEN (taker_buy_quote_volume / (taker_buy_volume + 1e-8) - (quote_volume - taker_buy_quote_volume) / (volume - taker_buy_volume + 1e-8)) / (((high + low) / 2) + 1e-8) ELSE NULL END
